title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Final-year Students
questions.text: Ex-students from our course are coming here next week to talk to you about how to do well in your first job. Space for a maximum of thirty students, so sign up now.
questions.question: What does the notice tell students?

options.A: Former students will help people apply for jobs.
options.B: Students should register soon if they want to attend.
options.C: Only thirty students from the course may attend.

questions.explanation: The limited space means students need to sign up quickly.

questions.heading: Message from Lily to Ben
questions.text: Ben, I’m sorry but I can’t meet you outside the cinema at six. My music lesson is finishing late today. I’ve bought our tickets online, so go in and I’ll find you before the film starts. Lily
questions.question: Why is Lily texting Ben?

options.A: To tell him she will arrive later than planned.
options.B: To ask him to buy the cinema tickets.
options.C: To cancel their visit to the cinema.

questions.explanation: Lily will still go, but she cannot meet Ben at the planned time.

questions.heading: Bike Repair Morning
questions.text: Bring your bike to the sports centre this Saturday between 9 and 12. Our mechanics will check brakes and tyres for free. Small repairs can be done while you wait, but new parts must be paid for.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: Some bike problems can be fixed without an appointment.
options.B: All repairs at the sports centre are free this Saturday.
options.C: Cyclists must buy new parts before the mechanics help.

questions.explanation: Small repairs can be done while people wait, so no appointment is mentioned.

questions.heading: From: Mr Patel / Subject: Geography homework
questions.text: Well done for finishing your map work. For next lesson, please choose one coastal town and find out how tourism has changed it. Bring notes, not a printed article, because we’ll discuss your own ideas in groups.
questions.question: What should students do before the next lesson?

options.A: Prepare information to use in a class discussion.
options.B: Print an article about tourism in coastal towns.
options.C: Finish drawing the map they started in class.

questions.explanation: Students must bring notes about a coastal town for discussion.

questions.heading: School Café
questions.text: From Monday, hot lunches must be ordered before morning break. Students who forget can still buy sandwiches or fruit at lunchtime. This change will help kitchen staff prepare the right amount of food.
questions.question: What is changing in the school café?

options.A: Students need to order cooked food earlier in the day.
options.B: Sandwiches will no longer be sold at lunchtime.
options.C: Kitchen staff will decide what students can eat.

questions.explanation: Hot lunches must now be ordered before morning break.
